summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HimPrash EV Accessories Platform iteration 2 refinements. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with INR currency, 2W EV products, improved UI, and updated categories.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Get all products API (12 products returned)
Get categories API (5 categories: Charging, Safety, Mounts, Storage, Tech Accessories)
Filter products by Safety category (3 products returned)
Filter products by Mounts category (3 products returned)
Filter products by INR price range (₹1000-₹3000 returns 3 products)
Get featured products (6 featured products returned)
Get single product prod-001 (Smart Home EV Charger with ₹4999 price)
404 error handling for non-existent products
All products are 2W EV accessories (no car-related products)
Homepage loads with updated hero showing urban scooter scene and 2W EV content
Hero CTA 'Explore Products' navigates to /products
Perks section shows Indian-specific content (ISI Certified, Pan-India Delivery, Rider Support)
Featured products show INR prices with green ₹ symbol
Navbar links work correctly (Home, Products)
Product Listing page shows 12 products with correct INR prices
Categories filter correctly: Charging, Mounts, Safety, Storage, Tech Accessories
Category filters work (Safety shows 3 products, Mounts shows 3 products)
Price range slider works with INR values (max ₹5,000)
Product cards have rounded corners and hover effects
Product detail page shows ₹ pricing and correct product info
Add to Cart button shows toast notification
Breadcrumb navigation works on product detail page
Footer shows 'Made in India for EV riders'
Improved UI contrast with #0E1117 background and #161B22 cards
